args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE title = 'Get Me Bodied' AND artist = 'Beyoncé';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE title = 'Get Me Bodied' AND artist = 'Beyoncé';

result.preview: [{"track_id": "4233", "title": "Get Me Bodied (Sexxxplicit R&B, Volume 25)", "artist": "Beyonc\u00e9", "album": "Sexxxplicit R&B, Volume 25", "year": "2007"}, {"track_id": "5281", "title": "GetMe Bodied", "artist": "Beyonc\u00e9", "album": "Sexxxplicit R&B, Volume X25", "year": "2007"}, {"track_id": "12954", "title": "Get Me Bodied - Sexxxplicit R&B, Volume 25", "artist": "Beyonc\u00e9", "album": "None", "year": "'07"}]

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE artist LIKE '%Beyoncé%' LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE artist LIKE '%Beyoncé%' LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT SUM(revenue_usd) FROM sales WHERE track_id IN ('4233', '5281', '12954') AND store = 'Apple Music' AND country = 'Canada';

exec_args.sql: SELECT SUM(revenue_usd) FROM sales WHERE track_id IN ('4233', '5281', '12954') AND store = 'Apple Music' AND country = 'Canada';
